name: Sliced Kiwi and Banana with Strawberry Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Place strawberries in blender with lemon juice and 1/4 cup water.
(Thawed unsweetened strawberries could be substituted.)
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Press through fine strainer into medium-sized saucepan.
(Sauce foams as it cooks, so you will need the extra space.)
4. Add sugar to mixture; bring to a boil.
5. Lower heat; simmer 5 minutes.
6. Mix cornstarch with 1 tablespoon water; stir into mixture for 1 to 2 minutes or until thickened.
7. Remove from heat and cool before chilling.
8. Just before serving, peel kiwis and bananas.
9. Place several tablespoons of strawberry mixture in the corner of each dessert plate.
10. Slice 1 kiwi and half a banana into overlapping semicircles around each pool of sauce.
(If you have any strawberry mixture left over, it's delicious on ice cream.)
